examples: Other famous Round Table Knights included Lancelot, Bedevere, Bors, Galahad, Perceval and Modred..
Only three knights---Bors, Galahad, and Perceval---were pure enough in life to find the Grail in the castle of Corbenic. They took the Grail to the distant city of Sarras.
In 1762, Spencer Perceval, British prime minister from 1809 until his assassination in the House of Commons in 1812, was born.
